human-review.evidence: Delegated autonomous drive. Reviewed: 15-REQ spec (Q1 resume-as-terminal-launch resolution respecting TOS posture + 2 pre-gate revisions), answer/resume write actions via F7 dispatch, shared useOrkyEntryActions/launchTerminalAt seams for F10, 7-lens review (22 findings incl. a two-lens-confirmed detached-SUCCESS contract violation) all resolved + 2 new LOW residuals, TEST-584..623 + 6 frozen-pin CONV-019 amendments, CONV-041..046 promoted. Codex cross-check wedged by API error, cancelled (additive). Suite 1398 green. Residuals: FINDING-021/022 (LOW, documented).

escalations.reason: Review fan-out (6 lenses; codex additive cross-check wedged in queue by an API error, cancelled — degrade-gracefully). One contract blocker + real MEDIUMs, mixed origin. FINDING-012 (two-lens: detached SUCCESS silently dropped, REQ-010/CONV-034 — plan-origin), FINDING-009 (pre-check defeats the shared-flight fan-out → the F10 cross-instance reuse shows no result, implement), FINDING-013 (preview drops phase/reason; frozen fixtures used an unreal drive shape, tests), FINDING-016/017/020 (ux: no open-focus, dead Enter, form stays armed post-success=duplicate-invite), plus LOWs 008/011/019/021. Human decision on the loopback.
escalations.decision: Loop back to tests (delegated). Fixes: FINDING-012 — deliver() MUST route a detached SUCCESS through the never-suppressed pushToast too (mirror F12 OrkyCaptureModal), honesty-class preserved; pin it. FINDING-009 — drop the redundant hook-level isInFlight pre-check so the core's withSingleFlight fan-out reaches every mounted instance (the second instance renders the settled result, not silent revert); pin the two-instance POST-SETTLE state. FINDING-013 — settlePreview renders next + phase + reason from the REAL gk.drive shape ({next,phase,reason}); fix the frozen fixtures that flattened it to the unreal {next:'run-phase spec'} and add a real-shape vector. FINDING-016 — move focus into the inline input on open (reuse useOpenFocusRestore). FINDING-017 — Enter in the single decision input submits (form or onKeyDown, CONV-030-guarded). FINDING-020 — disarm the form on success (close + clear) so a settled answer can't be re-fired against a now-resolved escalation. FINDING-008/010 — add a narrow launchTerminalAt(cwd,launch) store action instead of exposing raw commitPane on State; keep REQ-014 behavior. FINDING-011 — scope the rendered result/error to the active control (reset phase on open). FINDING-019 — role=status on dq-action-result/pending. FINDING-021 (LOW, spec-origin verify->write TOCTOU) + its proposed CONV — accept as a documented residual (same class as the disclosed cross-window one; the gatekeeper re-resolve is idempotent-enough), do NOT fix now; record it.

implementer.reason: Loopback fix cycle; A-B degraded to single implementer (codex worktree env failure, documented on F7). Networking/honesty compensated by the frozen indeterminate+detached-toast vectors + the networking review lens.

loopbacks.reason: 1 contract blocker (012 detached-success drop) + 009/013/016/017/020 + LOWs; per ESC-001
